mnemonics: The 4 Ps of UP: Phases, Practices, Principles, and Pillars. Remember: UP uses Iterative and Incremental Development (IID) - think of building a house one room at a time with constant feedback.
keyPoints: A disciplined, iterative and incremental framework for building object-oriented systems
Organized into four distinct phases: Inception, Elaboration, Construction, Transition
Emphasizes architecture-centric approach and risk management
Uses UML for modeling and is customizable with practices like Agile UP
commonMistakes: Treating UP as a rigid, one-size-fits-all methodology rather than a flexible framework
Confusing UP with the Waterfall model due to its phase-based structure, despite being iterative
